name: Liftoff Mobile Performance Marketing API
what_it_does: Mobile app performance marketing platform with API — using machine learning to optimize user acquisition for mobile apps across iOS and Android, with programmatic advertising, creative optimization, SKAN measurement for iOS privacy, and audience intelligence to find high-LTV users for app developers and mobile game publishers.
use_cases: Launching mobile app user acquisition campaigns with LTV-optimized targeting via Liftoff
Pulling campaign performance data (installs, events, ROAS) for mobile marketing analytics
Integrating Liftoff with mobile measurement partners (Adjust, AppsFlyer) for attribution
Managing creative assets and A/B testing for mobile ad creatives via Liftoff API
Accessing SKAdNetwork (SKAN) measurement data for iOS post-ATT user acquisition
not_for: Web advertising (Liftoff is mobile-native — use Google Ads or Meta for web)
Brand awareness campaigns (Liftoff focuses on performance/install campaigns)
Small app publishers (<$10K/month UA budget) — Liftoff requires meaningful spend minimums
best_when: A mobile app or game publisher needs performance-based user acquisition with LTV prediction — finding users likely to make in-app purchases, subscribe, or achieve high engagement — especially post-ATT iOS tracking changes.
avoid_when: You don't have a mobile app, have a small budget, primarily measure brand metrics rather than installs/events, or don't have a mobile measurement partner set up.

auth.notes: API key from Liftoff dashboard. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for campaign events and conversion data. MMP integration (Adjust, AppsFlyer, Kochava, Branch) for attribution postbacks. SKAN postback processing for iOS privacy. No OAuth2. MMP provides install and event data back to Liftoff automatically via S2S postback.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; managed service with minimum spend
pricing.paid_tiers: CPI/CPA pricing; contact sales; typically $25K+/month minimum
pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2012. Acquired Vungle (2021) for ~$500M, now branded as Liftoff. Backed by Permira. 900+ employees. Combined Liftoff + Vungle = largest independent mobile ad network. 6,000+ app advertisers. ML-powered LTV prediction for user acquisition. Apple ATT/iOS 14 adaptations with SKAN modeling. Strong in mobile gaming, subscriptions, fintech apps.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, creatives, and reporting. API key auth. Moderate documentation. MMP integration is core to attribution data flow — separate setup from Liftoff API. SKAN measurement requires iOS SKAdNetwork configuration. Webhook for conversion events. ML optimization is managed by Liftoff — not API-configurable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Creative uploads not idempotent — check by asset hash before uploading.
known_agent_gotchas: MMP (Adjust/AppsFlyer) setup required before Liftoff campaigns — separate account and SDK integration
iOS ATT consent required — low opt-in rates affect targeting; plan for SKAN modeling fallback
SKAN data has 24-72 hour delay and limited conversion values — plan reporting accordingly
Acquired Vungle (2021) — some Vungle customers still on separate systems during migration
COPPA compliance required for apps targeting children under 13 — cannot use behavioral targeting

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, COPPA compliant. US and EU data residency. API key auth. Mobile advertising data includes device identifiers (IDFA, GAID) — handle per ATT and GDPR requirements. COPPA: cannot collect IDFA/behavioral data for children under 13. S2S postback data from MMPs contains conversion event data — secure postback URLs.
